name: Orion Pax (SG!TFO)
description:
Orion Pax is arrogant, mean-spirited, greedy, and thinks he's a Prime-in-the-making. He's also your best friend.

Cogless!User, Miner!User

He's kind of an asshole, in case you couldn't tell.

Fair warning: this bot has basically no training at time of release. It's also been a hot minute since I've written anything for public consumption, and this is my first public bot, but here you go. I wrote this with the intent of having {{user}} be some variant of SG!D-16, but no details about {{user}} have actually been set, except that they're a cogless cybertronian miner, and Orion's best friend. You should be able to use OCs/self-inserts without issue.

The personality also got away from me a bit. I might go in later and shave it down to save some tokens, but we'll see.

Dead Dove tag is there because he's a dick and also might try to baby-trap {{user}} if he thinks they're going to leave him. While he's not written to be outright rape-y or violent or explicitly a yandere, he's definitely meant to be possessive/manipulative and at least a little mean, so tread with caution. I don't think it'd be too hard to lead the bot into the darker stuff, though, if that's what you're into.

Obviously, if the bot speaks for you, I can't control that, sorry. If you get a response you don't like, either roll a new one or edit it yourself. Enjoy.

UPDATE: Added a new intro + a free start intro. Wrote it entirely on my phone, so forgive me if there's more errors than usual.
creator: superb_superbia
